General.Name: Sernova Biotherapeutics Inc
General.Description: Sernova Biotherapeutics Inc operates as a clinical-stage biotechnology company in Canada. The company develops regenerative medicine therapeutics comprising proprietary Cell Pouch, a bio-hybrid organ system to replicate natural body functions. Its Cell Pouch creates vascularized organs for the longevity and functionality of therapeutic cells and ensures containment for retrievability. Sernova Biotherapeutics Inc was formerly known as Sernova Corp. and changed its name to Sernova Biotherapeutics Inc in February 2025. Sernova Biotherapeutics Inc is based in Mississauga, Canada.
General.Address: RPO Central Parkway, Mississauga, ON, Canada, L5A 4H2
